body.title: Fix e2e test: [REDACTED-CREDENTIAL] after proof validation
body.result: e2e + dispatch-chain tests aligned with proof validation — 15ddf029
body.description:
T-announce-proof-validation added proof field validation to the announce broker — protected agent_ids (igor, cc) now require a non-empty proof field. The e2e test `[REDACTED-CREDENTIAL]` (tests/e2e/test_rack_boot.py) still sends an announce without a proof field, so it now gets an error reply instead of a manifest reply and fails.

**Affected files:** tests/e2e/test_rack_boot.py
**Design rules:** none — test update only
**Scope boundary:** In scope: update the test to either (a) send a valid proof, (b) use a non-protected agent_id, or (c) test the proof validation behavior explicitly. Out of scope: changing the announce broker or proof validation logic.
**Completion criteria:** [REDACTED-CREDENTIAL] passes; all other announce tests continue to pass
